JETTA ENGINE QUIT RUNNING WITH NO NOTICE IN BUSY HIGHWAY.  CAR HAD TO BE TOWED TO DEALER. CAR WAS NOT REPAIRED FOR THREE WEEKS.  THEY CITED LACK OF FUEL SYSTEM MANAGEMENT COMPUTER MODULE.  IT WOULD TAKE 5-7 BUSINESS DAYS TO GET.  FUEL COMPUTER MODULE AND FUEL PUMP WERE REPLACED.

narrative.headline: What 2016 Volkswagen Jetta owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 160 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (27% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
